rationale: The previous attempt asserted the ensures-foralls as standalone facts, but the synthetic ensures is `LHS ==> det_set_equal`, so LHS conjuncts are not hypotheses outside the antecedent — that's why two of those asserts failed. We wrap the proof in `if (LHS) { ... }` so every ensures-conjunct is in scope, call `valid_implies_complete` on both posts to expose `dom().is_full()`, then prove per-K equality by constructing the non-end iterator `KeyIterator { k: Some(k) }` (whose open specs give `!is_end_spec()` and `*get() == k`) and case-splitting on `KeyIterator::between(*lo, ki, *hi)` — the shared trigger that instantiates all four ensures-foralls. Map extensionality (`=~=`) then closes the goal.
